title: Oldroyd-B Viscoelastic Constitutive Model Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: rho * Dv/Dt = -grad(p) + div(tau); tau = tau_s + tau_p; tau_p + lambda_1 * stress_UCM = 2*eta_p*D; stress_UCM = dtau/dt + v.grad(tau) - (grad(v))^T tau - tau grad(v)
E.inverse: recover (lambda_1, eta_p, beta) from measured N1(gamma_dot), velocimetry

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=30) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class DEVSS-G finite element with log-conformation; parameter inversion by adjoint-PDE optimization provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
